item.title: You can play pretend that American intervention in someway could provide democracy to Iran, but if you would like to join us in ...
item.description:
You can play pretend that American intervention in someway could provide democracy to Iran, but if you would like to join us in the real world you will recognise that it isn’t even trying to

item.title: They can likely find soem Kurds saying some thing bc suprise suprise… they ain’t a monolith
item.description:
They can likely find soem Kurds saying some thing bc suprise suprise… they ain’t a monolith. But overwhelmingly, no this is not true, and no it’s just the US trying to incite invasion

item.title: No longer are the days where the American Empire says something and it is true and fascist to are the dying throes of an empire ...
item.description:
No longer are the days where the American Empire says something and it is true and fascist to are the dying throes of an empire recognising that as a fundamental opposition to their existence
